name: git-commit-message-button
description: Generate detailed git commit messages with one click.

gitCommitMessageButton.generationMode.description: hosted = your proxy server (no user API key); anthropic = user's own key; local = offline template only.

gitCommitMessageButton.hostedProxyUrl.description: HTTPS URL of your deployed proxy (e.g. https://your-app.onrender.com). Required for hosted mode.

gitCommitMessageButton.hostedProxyAccess.description: Optional Bearer token matching PROXY_ACCESS_TOKEN on your server (not your Anthropic key).

gitCommitMessageButton.maxDiffBytes.description: Maximum git diff bytes read while generating a message.

gitCommitMessageButton.includeBody.description: Include a detailed body beneath the commit subject.

gitCommitMessageButton.useAnthropic.description: Use Anthropic model for commit message generation.

gitCommitMessageButton.anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key used when useAnthropic is enabled.

gitCommitMessageButton.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model id for message generation.

gitCommitMessageButton.anthropicMaxToken.description: Max response tokens for Anthropic completion.

gitCommitMessageButton.maxFileContentCha.description: Max characters per previous/current file snapshot sent to Anthropic.
